name: Can I get pain and suffering money for work slip injury?
description: No, comp only covers economic losses—no pain/suffering.

mainEntity.name: Can I get pain and suffering money for work slip injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, comp only covers economic losses—no pain/suffering.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, workers' comp excludes non-economic damages like pain/suffering; only medical, wages, impairment[4]. Key factors: Third-party fault allows suit. Comp trade-off: quicker, guaranteed.
